page_metadata.biotools__summary: Service platform for interdisciplinary work on biological application domains. It uses the jETI (Java Electronic Tool Integration Platform) service integration technology for remote tool integration and the jABC framework as a graphical workflow modeling tool.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Service platform for interdisciplinary work on biological application domains. It uses the jETI (Java Electronic Tool Integration Platform) service integration technology for remote tool integration and the jABC framework as a graphical workflow modeling tool.
